name: notion-extension
description: Notion database querying with people property filters and relation property updates. Designed for Agentic Tasks plugin.

tools.name: notion-query
tools.description: Query a Notion database with server-side filtering, sorting, and pagination. Supports people property filters (Assignees) that the Notion hosted MCP cannot handle.

tools.name: notion-update-relation
tools.description: Update a relation property on a Notion page. Supports replace (set exact list) and append (merge with existing, dedup) modes.

notion_token.title: Notion Internal Integration Token
notion_token.description: Your Notion internal integration token (ntn_...). Create one at https://www.notion.so/profile/integrations with Read content permission, then connect it to your Agentic Tasks page.
